title: South road - shield wall encounter (prototype)
description: Predetermined beats for Ashmere 28 ~mile 15.5. AI only fills dialogue slots marked ai_slots.

state_hint.note: Runner optionally checks kenji_state.json: location should reference mile 15.5; day ~250.

continuation_choices.label: Resolve the shield wall in authored chapter prose + dm_rules; optionally set kenji_state flag mile155_formation_adjusted
Extend scenes_mile155.json (e.g. add s05 combat branch) and re-run run_scene_graph.py
Continue off-graph: paste the RUN_RECEIPT block into your session notes so play cannot claim the tool ran without this ID

s01_dead_oak.title: Dead oak - invisible overwatch
s01_dead_oak.narration:
Mist climbs to chest height. The south road is a grey ribbon through black glass and dead grass.

Sixty yards west of the road: a dead oak, bark peeled, branches like broken spears. You're in the crook, invisible, elevated - the ronin hat low, mask on, nodachi across your knees.

East of the road: your smoke-clone walks with the party. Jostin's journal is out. Brynn's shield catches dull light - amber-gold eyes, steady grip. Nobody's talking. Everyone's listening.

Ahead: a formation. Forty-two skeletons in a shield wall. Three shapes behind them that read wrong - revenants, not rookies. The root network underfoot hums faintly, pulsing south. Something knows you're here.

**[PREDETERMINED - not generated by AI.]**

s02_jostin_slot.title: Jostin - voice slot
s02_jostin_slot.narration:
Jostin stops writing. His eyes stay on the formation. One finger taps the journal spine - once, twice - like he's counting teeth.

**>> AI VOICE SLOT (below). Everything above this line is fixed.**

ai_slots.speaker: jostin
ai_slots.prompt: Write ONE or TWO sentences: Jostin mutters under his breath about the formation (shield wall density, revenant count, or the root hum). Do not introduce new named NPCs. Do not advance plot past observation. Do not use 'Seravane' - if you must name the enemy faction, say 'the Lady's line' or 'Pallid March'.

s03_brynn_slot.title: Brynn - voice slot
s03_brynn_slot.narration:
Brynn doesn't look at Jostin. She looks at the gap between two skeletons - the seam where a charge might split.

**>> AI VOICE SLOT (below). Everything above this line is fixed.**

ai_slots.speaker: brynn
ai_slots.prompt: Write ONE or TWO sentences: Brynn says something minimal about holding the line or the shield weight - in character. If you mention partner/intimacy mechanics, Brynn is Partner #19 (not #20). Forbidden: Seravane.

s04_predetermined_beat.title: Beat - no AI (combat resolution is authored separately)
s04_predetermined_beat.narration:
The clone stops. The formation does not rush - it waits. Remote command: a pulse in the root network, and the shield wall slides one step south, closing the seam Brynn was watching.

**[PREDETERMINED]** Your next authorial choice (full combat engine, dice, vaporize counts) lives in dm_rules + chapter prose - this prototype stops here. The app would advance `scene_id` and set flags in `kenji_state.json` only after you resolve combat elsewhere.

Flag suggestion for state file: `mile155_formation_adjusted: true`
